textByHashes.aeb45e5bad49c3e4753c9d26c2dcdeab996e7566: Not without a uniform you're not.
textByHashes.a115904faff2320ab36fd6e57225f2c3b7e0077d: Oh, nilsal, to you. I wasn't expecting anyone else.
textByHashes.4aa67df62166f541af3e34da86b516cfa0d4ad72: A hold up? Nothing bad I hope? I've known people to have problems with their employers before. Is yours treating you well?
textByHashes.544a2f2ef066ab9ad7936b8a6032cd23026575e6: Tetamo! Oh dear, oh dear. Are you part of a union?
textByHashes.3697f3d65319198fc85a1001a578d1f2e4581233: We have a fantastic one here on Aldarin, if you're interested. I can't say discussions are effective, but sometimes the wealthy do come to the table!
textByHashes.cfd536c9e8bd5b8a22011973e276ec88a5003b98: Very well. In that case, there are just a few quick admin bits to go through before I let you in.
textByHashes.f84ea0c16721a5811715a5a52c3a1bb4aaead718: First and foremost, butlers must keep their uniforms and masks on at all times. If you are seen without yours, you will be ejected from the party.
textByHashes.970ac040f547d1afc5777f11a3824164f261d909: All staff are to be as anonymous as possible tonight so we'll provide you with a mask on entry. We'll be using them to keep track of who's coming and going.
textByHashes.ba43013af546cd3c92cce4cbb54e0796f4267f77: Now, for security purposes, butlers are required to enter and leave with completely empty pockets. We'll hold on to anything you need us to whilst you're in there.
textByHashes.b160639192174634018327e0d8774ac4ef3a4a1c: Right, I think that covers everything. Are you ready to enter?
textByHashes.120820881f3982a2a034434c650e9b13e73e3e6d: Good good. We'll hold on to any items you have on you whilst you're in there.
textByHashes.a0372197ea1d574e0e0442781743b3daca4ffe0a: Then you should put your follower away.
textByHashes.70d06f6b9edddd9971c1bfdbecb80ba17e8d226e: Ah, welcome back. Are you ready to enter?
textByHashes.9f0a99bc5070c354fdd17ab491f7ed4abd28f6c9: Do you want to go back in?
textByHashes.5a32b4160dde619d75626ae10b6c88384653f360: After all that, are you sure I can't convince you to join the union?
textByHashes.89e8dfd42b203ecaf98b024c2a2ea298d3c9d9e1: Kuani! I'll need to run and grab my forms, but if you wait there just a moment...
textByHashes.529e4f4ee635d20501549312b06518cae1353510: You're certain you don't want to join the union as well?
textByHashes.c9da149914dd1f5ec5f6f5252d6ccfc3f044a0bd: I see. In that case, which equipment would you like?
textByHashes.c8b91ef54d4af7efaa90fa865581d5792aaa5e6c: Changed your mind about joining the union? Or are you just after more equipment?
textByHashes.c4ade844331031efa30806b021454983995b3774: I see. In that case, what do you need?
